'''Grejj''' served in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] to the garrison on [[Vryssa]] as [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]].

Sent out in command of an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] to prevent [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] from infiltrating the base, Grejj died when the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] cut communications and hijacked a second AT-AT under the control of [[Byrga]]. Two [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]] stumbled into the fight and, confused by the battle, fired on Grejj's walker.
